history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, high-contrast, slightly grainy photograph captures a young person from the back, wearing an oversized hooded sweatshirt. The person is holding a smartphone in their right hand, pointed towards a mirror, with the flash illuminating the scene. They are wearing glasses and have messy, dark hair peeking out from under the hood. Two rings are visible on their right hand. The hoodie has bold white lettering on the back, though the text is partially obscured and reversed due to the mirror reflection.

The background suggests an indoor setting, possibly a cafe or a lounge area. To the left, out of focus, are tables and chairs, and a glimpse of another person sitting in the distance. Large windows with blinds are visible on the far left wall, letting in natural light that, along with the phone's flash, creates strong highlights and deep shadows. The overall mood is candid, modern, and a bit edgy, with a focus on the subject's silhouette and the dramatic lighting. The color palette is strictly black, white, and shades of gray. The composition is centered on the person and their action of taking a selfie.
